response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, including Java and JVM-related work in past roles, but lacks focused, recent experience with enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling, Spring, or IDE internals — his recent work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of deep JVM or IDE subsystem development.
strengths: Demonstrated ability to work on complex, low-latency systems across multiple languages.
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops and talks.
Proven track record in full-stack development and cross-functional collaboration.
concerns: No recent, demonstrable work on Java/Kotlin IDE tooling or JVM internals.
Primary recent tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js, not enterprise Java ecosystems.
Lacks clear evidence of experience with Spring, Hibernate, or application server integration.
